sleeve_cap.note: add web/data/positions.local.json (gitignored) for the live sleeve value

trim_rule.note: add positions.local.json with cost basis to evaluate

account_policy.ira: Tactical sleeve — deploy/accelerate per the posture (tax-free turnover).
account_policy.taxable: Buy-and-hold anchors — stay invested; ignore the timing dial here.

structures: long call / LEAPS for capped-downside leverage
options_suggestion.rationale: leveraged upside vs. buying more shares, with defined risk

regime.action: Uptrend + positive 12m momentum, contained vol — deploy on schedule / accelerate low-regret anchors.
regime.basis: trend(200-DMA)+abs-momentum(12m)+vol-state+drawdown, +20-DMA fast re-entry +VIX/HY macro overlay; see REGIME.md
regime.note: trend 20% vs 200-DMA · 12m mom 70% · -6% from highs · vol 1.24x · breadth200 78% · breadth20 89%

metrics.note: trailing ~2.4y, target-weighted strategy basket (from accumulated history)

attribution.note: no significant alpha — return is explained by market + momentum + theme exposure (i.e. beta)

signal_backtest.caveat: current-membership universe (selection/survivorship bias) → IC is an UPPER BOUND; prices are point-in-time; live ledger is the unbiased confirmation.

forced_flow.guidance: Accumulate: timing permits — forced/neglect selling into an intact thesis.

dislocation_entry.reason: Act: a thesis-intact dislocation is present AND timing has turned — V2.3 trend re-confirmed (FULL); Puck's 20-DMA fast re-entry is firing.
